content.text:
{
  "family": "run_only",
  "case_id": "collect_even_square_labels",
  "bug_category": "iterator_filter_map_logic",
  "difficulty": "easy",
  "user": "Run the Rust crate at {project_root} and report the program output exactly.",
  "expected_tool_sequence": [
    "cargo_run"
  ],
  "expected_output": "n=2 sq=4
n=4 sq=16
sum=20",
  "files": {
    "Cargo.toml": "[package]
name = "collect_even_square_labels"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
",
    "src/main.rs": "fn main() {
    let values = [1, 2, 3, 4, 5];

    let lines: Vec<String> = values
        .iter()
        .copied()
        .filter(|n| n % 2 == 0)
        .map(|n| format!("n={} sq={}", n, n * n))
        .collect();

    let sum: i32 = values
        .iter()
        .copied()
        .filter(|n| n % 2 == 0)
        .map(|n| n * n)
        .sum();

    println!("{}\nsum={}", lines.join("\n"), sum);
}
"
  },
  "steps": [
    {
      "tool": "cargo_run",
      "expect_status": "success"
    }
  ],
  "final": "FINAL: n=2 sq=4
n=4 sq=16
sum=20"
}
